Chalk theme for highcharts

Source: R/theme-chalk.R
hc_theme_chalk.Rd

Chalk theme for highcharts

Usage

hc_theme_chalk(...)

Arguments

...

A named parameters to modify the theme.

Chalk theme for highcharts was inspired by https://www.amcharts.com/demos/.

Examples


highcharts_demo() |>
  hc_add_theme(hc_theme_chalk())

On this page
